title: LumiKids Printable Coloring Animals
prompt:
Playful 2D illustration for a printable kids coloring activity, cute smiling animals on a simple page with crayons and large coloring spaces, pastel palette, premium children's education style, clean composition, no text

Avoid: photorealistic, cluttered, watermark, text, scary, dark mood
